rationale: The cited 2000 JMKR paper’s core contribution is generating and explaining consumer preference intransitivity, and the citing 2023 paper’s central research question and focal constructs also revolve around testing transitivity/intransitivity in consumer valuations. Given this direct conceptual overlap (intransitive choice mechanisms as a core construct in both notes), this is plausibly a substantive theory/foundation citation rather than an obvious incidental mention, even though only DOI-level match evidence is provided.
